narrative:
Winchester Township has 1,460 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.7 percentage points.
